hero.badge: The first AI app for moms
hero.title:
Every moment that
deserves to be remembered.
hero.subtitle: Write, speak or send a photo. HeyMaa organises your memories, records your children's development, and is always with you — no stress, no pressure.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Three ways. One story.
how.subtitle: No need to change your habits.

items.title: Write
items.body: A thought, a sentence — whenever you have a few seconds.

items.title: Speak
items.body: Hands full? Speak naturally, HeyMaa is there to listen. 💬

items.title: Show
items.body: Send a photo. Saved automatically to your story.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need.
features.subtitle: From memories to AI conversation and family sharing.

items.title: Development Timeline
items.body: Milestones per child, from newborn to 5+ years.

items.title: Family
items.body: Shared access with spouse, parents, siblings.

items.title: 23 Languages
items.body: Full UI, chat and voice in 23 languages.

safety.label: Security & Trust
safety.title: Your data belongs to you.
safety.subtitle: We built HeyMaa with privacy as a core principle — not a feature.

items.title: End-to-end encryption
items.body: Your memories are encrypted before storage. Nobody — not even us — can read them.

items.title: Never medical advice
items.body: For anything health-related, HeyMaa always refers you to a doctor or pharmacist. No exceptions.

items.title: Full deletion anytime
items.body: Delete everything with one click. We keep no copies.

items.title: GDPR · EU data storage
items.body: We store in Europe, fully GDPR compliant. We never sell data.

items.question: What does the free trial include?
items.answer: 3 days full access to all Premium features — unlimited chat, voice, full memory. No card needed.

items.question: Does HeyMaa give medical advice?
items.answer: Never. For anything health-related, HeyMaa refers you exclusively to a doctor or pharmacist.

items.question: Which languages does it support?
items.answer: 23 languages — Greek, English, Arabic, Chinese, Spanish, French, Romanian, Polish, Turkish, Hindi, Urdu, Japanese, Russian, German, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Bengali, Indonesian, Swahili, Filipino, Marathi, Telugu. UI, chat and voice all change to the selected language.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes, for monthly plans. Annual cancels at the end of the period.

items.question: What is Full Memory?
items.answer: Full Memory (Premium) adds AI Memory Suggestions — the app can automatically suggest which moments would be worth capturing, connecting conversations with memories.

cta.title: Start today.
cta.body:
You don't need more effort.
You need a smart solution that works for you.
